Class: AttributionWidget

bemap.AttributionWidget(map, optionsopt)

AttributionWidget — cross-engine map credits and legal mentions panel. Customers don't usually instantiate this directly; it is created automatically by each map constructor when `options.attribution` is omitted or set to a truthy value. Power users who want a fully customised setup can construct it explicitly.

Constructor

new AttributionWidget(map, optionsopt)

Parameters:
Name Type Attributes Description
map bemap.Map The bemap map instance the widget attaches to.
options Object <optional>
Properties
Name Type Attributes Default Description
position String <optional>
 'bottom-right' One of 'top-left' / 'top-right' / 'bottom-left' / 'bottom-right'.
customLines Array.<(String|{text:String, href:String})> <optional>
 Extra attribution lines (brand mention, overlay data licence, etc.). Each entry may be a plain string or a `{ text, href }` object.
noticesUrl String <optional>
 URL to the full open-source notices document (typically `OPEN_SOURCE_NOTICES.md` or `.txt`). When set, the popover shows a "Open source notices" footer link that opens the URL in a new tab.
noticesLabel String <optional>
 'Open source notices' Label of the notices footer link.
enabled Boolean <optional>
 true When false, the widget is constructed but not rendered.
Since:
  • 1.5.0
Source:
  • bemap-attribution/bemap-attribution-widget.js, line 37

Engine identifier: 'leaflet' | 'openlayers' | 'maplibre' | 'unknown'.

(protected) showKeyboardToggle :Boolean

Off by default — the popover is for legal mentions, not UI controls. Opt-in via `new bemap.AttributionWidget(map, { keyboardToggle: true })`.
Type:
  • Boolean
Source:
  • bemap-attribution/bemap-attribution-widget.js, line 89
